summary: Relay landing-page chat regressed due to API v1 contract drift across browser/relay/desktop paths, surfacing Unknown streaming error and Failed to encrypt response.
impact: Users could not complete landing-page chat round trips through relay with desktop compute-node participation, blocking API v1 validation in-browser.
fix: Pinned relay landing-page flow to API v1 non-streaming behavior and added an unmocked relay+desktop bridge+browser e2e test that verifies encrypted API v1 round-trip wiring.
lessons: Contract changes in encrypted API v1 paths require full integration tests across relay.py, static chat UI, and desktop bridge runtime; frontend-only API mocks are insufficient.
